rulings.Case Title: IN RE: JOSEFINA S. GUIUAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Under California Probate Code Sec 17200 Concerning The Internal Affairs Of The Trust: 1)Remiving The Trustee; 2)Passing Upon The Acts Of The Trustee; 3) Nullifying The Notification By Trustee Pursuant To Probate Code §16061.7
rulings.Rulings: Parties to appear. Issues to include: 1) Neither the alleged trustee nor his counsel is located in San Francisco. Petitioner alleges venue is proper here, as trusteeship is being challenged, and real property is located in San Francisco. 2) Court to determine whether petition should otherwise be granted as prayed. Objection has been filed. 3) Proposed order has not been submitted by Petitioner's counsel.
